description: The SigningBackend::public_key_der() trait contract (secretx-core/src/lib.rs:1411) specifies 'Return the public key as DER-encoded SubjectPublicKeyInfo.' The TPM2 implementation (secretx-tpm2/src/lib.rs:363-371) marshals a tss_esapi::structures::PublicBuffer (TPM2B_PUBLIC), which is a TPM-specific structure, not DER-encoded SPKI. Callers using standard crypto libraries (e.g. p256::pkcs8::DecodePublicKey::from_public_key_der) will fail to parse it. The PKCS#11 backend returns actual SPKI via CKA_PUBLIC_KEY_INFO, so the two backends are not interchangeable despite implementing the same trait. Fix: convert TPM public key parameters (ECC point or RSA modulus+exponent) into a proper SPKI structure using spki/der crates before returning.
title: tpm2: public_key_der returns TPM2B_PUBLIC not SPKI
